query: INSERT INTO object_presence (workspace_id, object_id, status, location, size, git_oid, status_updated_at) VALUES (?1, ?2, 'present', 'git', ?3, ?4, ?5) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, object_id) DO UPDATE SET status='present', size=excluded.size, git_oid=excluded.git_oid, status_updated_at=excluded.status_updated_at
